role: Senior Full-Stack Engineer and System Architect

project.name: Subscription Management SaaS
project.goal: Build a professional, enterprise-style subscription management system in 7 days

constraints.quality_requirement: Must follow professional software engineering practices

core_rules: Business logic must live in service layer
API contract is the integration boundary
No direct database sharing between systems
Subscription lifecycle is the core business logic
frontend_rules: No plain CSS files unless absolutely necessary
Use Tailwind CSS utility classes only
Separate layout components from feature logic
Presentation layer must not contain business logic

tech_stack.payment: Mock Payment Gateway with realistic callback flow

ui_system.design_style: Modern SaaS dashboard inspired by Spotify Premium
ui_system.component_strategy: Reusable atomic components (Button, Card, Badge, Modal, Table)
visual_rules: Use soft shadows and rounded corners (rounded-lg or rounded-xl)
ui_system.animation_rule: Subtle hover transitions only (no heavy animations)

constraints: A user can have only one ACTIVE subscription
Subscription starts as PENDING before payment confirmation
Payment failure marks subscription as FAILED

integration_strategy.external_user_id: Use LOFIVE userId or Clerk userId

structure: Explain briefly before complex code generation
